value="<b>Authentication</b><br>192.1.100.0/24: plain-text (cisco123)<br>192.1.101.0/24: MD5 per-interface (ccie123)<br>192.1.102.0/24: MD5 per-interface + PPP (ccie123)<br>192.1.103.0/24: none<br>192.1.67.0/24 — 192.1.90.0/24: none<br>R5: area 0 authentication message-digest<br>R11: area 0 authentication (plain-text)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="104" width="310" x="30" y="850" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dr_box" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=#FFFFFF;fillColor=#001DBC;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=10;spacingLeft=6;" value="<b>DR/BDR <mxGeometry height="74" width="280" x="360" y="850" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sum_box" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=#FFFFFF;fillColor=#001DBC;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=10;spacingLeft=6;" value="<b>Inter-Area div.div:
Authentication
192.1.100.0/24: plain-text (cisco123)
192.1.101.0/24: MD5 per-interface (ccie123)
192.1.102.0/24: MD5 per-interface + PPP (ccie123)
192.1.103.0/24: none
192.1.67.0/24 — 192.1.90.0/24: none
R5: area 0 authentication message-digest
R11: area 0 authentication (plain-text)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 272px; height: 1px; padding-top: 887px; margin-left: 368px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #FFFFFF;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #FFFFFF; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
DR/BDR Priority
192.1.100.0/24: R2 pri=10 (DR)
192.1.103.0/24: R4/R6 pri=10, R3 pri=5
192.1.78.0/24: P2P — no DR election
All loopbacks: ip ospf network point-to-point

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 282px; height: 1px; padding-top: 880px; margin-left: 668px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #FFFFFF;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #FFFFFF; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Inter-Area Summarization
R8: area 0 range 192.1.100.0 255.255.252.0
Covers: 192.1.100-103.0/24 → one Type 3 LSA
Visible as O IA on R9 and R10

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 292px; height: 1px; padding-top: 875px; margin-left: 978px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #FFFFFF;

div.div:
Tool: NAPALM
load_merge_candidate → compare_config → commit_config
IOL: dest_file_system=nvram:, inline_transfer=True
